title: Promote Pinake validation results into VS Code diagnostics
description:
Created from the project state audit.

Keep the current output-channel validation report, but also publish actionable validation results into VS Code Problems.

Scope:
- Convert `ValidationResult` issues into a `DiagnosticCollection` scoped to Pinake files.
- Preserve warning/error severity and line numbers where available.
- Clear stale diagnostics after successful validation or when files are repaired.
- Keep CLI validation output unchanged.
- Add tests for diagnostic severity, file mapping, line mapping, and stale diagnostic clearing.

Why this matters:
- Validation currently requires users to inspect the `Pinakes` output channel manually.
- Problems integration gives direct file navigation and makes warnings/errors visible in the normal VS Code workflow.

Code anchor: `src/services/ValidationService.ts:44`.

checklist.text: Map validation issues to workspace files, ranges, and diagnostic severities
Clear stale diagnostics after passing validation or repair
Add extension-host tests for Problems integration
